markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, production, and reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Strategy:** Shift to a pillar-and-cluster model for Enterprise Risk Management (ERM) topics, with AI as a central theme, to improve user experience and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [**Production Priority:** The \~5,000-word "AI vulnerability management" guide is the top priority for the RISC campaign and will be expedited.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**Internal Linking Rules:** New guidelines (3–4 links/1k words, no linking out on target keywords) will be implemented to improve user experience and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Reviewer Transition:** Festus is shifting to BoardEffect; kfarnham will become the primary content reviewer, pending a new workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy: ERM & Management Topics

  - [GrowthX organized ERM topics into a new spreadsheet for Diligent review.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [**New Strategy:** Adopt a pillar-and-cluster model for ERM content.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
      - [**Pillar Page:** A comprehensive guide serving as the central hub.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
      - [**Cluster Pages:** Supporting articles ("what is," "trends") that link to the pillar.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [**Key Update:** AI will be a central theme across all new and refreshed content.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [**Action:** kfarnham to review the ERM topic spreadsheet and add approved items to the production pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)

### Production & Pipeline Updates

  - [**High Priority → "AI vulnerability management" guide**](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
      - [**Length:** \~5,000 words.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Supports the RISC campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
      - [**Status:** Near completion; will be expedited.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**Pipeline Status:** 27 topics are in the "proof to start" queue.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [**Next Batch:** GRC-specific articles are in progress and will be ready for review next week.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)

### Internal Linking Best Practices

  - [New guidelines will be implemented to improve user experience and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Link Density:** Target 3–4 internal links per 1,000 words.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Avoids overwhelming users and is more effective for bots.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Anchor Text:** Do not link out on a page's target keyword.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prevents cannibalization and maintains focus.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [**User Flow:** Link down the funnel (e.g., "what is" → software comparison) to guide users naturally.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)

### Reviewer Workflow & Reporting

  - [**Reviewer Transition:** Festus is shifting focus to BoardEffect.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
      - [kfarnham will become the primary content reviewer.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
      - [The team will coordinate internally before updating the Optimizely workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - [**Regional Reporting:** Tyler requested sub-regional performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [**Initial Idea:** Use Ahrefs/GSC country filters.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [**Recommendation:** Use Diligent's proprietary analytics for more accurate, regex-based regional data.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
      - [**Decision:** This is an analytics task for Diligent, not GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**kfarnham:** Review ERM topic spreadsheet; add approved items to the production queue.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Expedite the "AI vulnerability management" guide.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Deliver the GRC article batch for review next week.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [**All:** Implement new internal linking best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Diligent:** Coordinate the internal reviewer transition from Festus to kfarnham.](https://fathom.video/share/3L5-bRycfsEJTM_sr28HDDNKi5-g3FAN?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
